channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Trump Cancels Signing of Bipartisan Housing Bill Containing CBDC Ban: 'Of Minor Importance'
item.description: President Trump said he won’t sign the popular bill until Congress passes a controversial bill restricting voting rights.

item.title: Ex-FCA policy insider explains the ‘great divide’ in the UK’s crypto ambition
item.description: Former FCA policymaker and Hedera Global Policy VP, Isadora Arredondo says there is a gap between the U.K.'s crypto ambitions and how policy is carried out in practice.

item.title: Trump cancels signing of housing bill with CBDC ban
item.description: The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act included a provision that the US Federal Reserve was barred from issuing or creating a CBDC until 2030, but exempted certain stablecoins.

item.title: Binance withdraws Greece-filed MiCA application.
item.description: Binance said it plans to seek authorization in another EU jurisdiction just days ahead of the July 1 MiCA deadline, as unlicensed crypto firms are expected to wind down activities in the bloc.

item.title: The Impossibility of Perfect Fairness in Transaction Ordering
item.description: Why perfect fairness cannot hold in asynchronous networks, and how different blockchains adopt different relaxations to fairness.

item.title: Bitcoin just broke below the floor of its famous Rainbow Chart into the ‘BTC is dead’ zone
item.description: A 50% drop from recent highs has pushed the asset into a zone historically labeled as a dead end, sparking a debate among crypto analysts.

item.title: The banking lobby is wrong about stablecoins and community banks
item.description: Congress should not kneecap one of the clearest advances in payment infrastructure to protect community banks from a threat that has not been proven, argues Eco CEO Ryne Saxe.

item.title: Strategy Shares Crash Below $100 as Bitcoin Sinks Towards $60K
item.description: Bitcoin fell to a two-week low price Wednesday as Strategy shares dove below the $100 mark for the first time since March 2024.

item.title: How memecoin marketing moved from online speculation to real-world risk
item.description: From alcohol dares to head-shaving challenges, memecoin campaigns are turning engagement into exploitation.

item.title: DeFi TVL drops 39% in 2026 amid market downturn and record hack activity
item.description: DeFi TVL fell 39% in 2026 as a broader market downturn and fallout from major exploits, including the Kelp DAO hack, weighed on the sector.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Gold, silver and bitcoin tumble as 'debasement' trade unwinds
item.description: Precious metals have fallen sharply from their 2025 highs as markets price in Fed rate hikes.

item.title: Bitcoin could fall to $55,000 before finding a bottom, 10x Research says
item.description: A strengthening U.S. dollar and the Fed's hawkish turn under new chair Kevin Warsh may keep pressure on crypto through the summer.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Aave (AAVE) gains 5.9% as index moves higher
item.description: Internet Computer (ICP), up 2% from Tuesday, joined Aave (AAVE) as a top performer.

item.title: CZ, Binance founder, wants to clear up 'misunderstandings' about who he is
item.description: The former CEO of the world's largest crypto exchange is seeking to redefine himself to the world on his own terms.

item.title: Aave could soar to $3,500 by 2030 on DeFi revival, says StanChart
item.description: Geoff Kendrick said Aave has moved past April's cyberattack-related market disruption and is well positioned to benefit from growth in tokenized assets and DeFi.

item.title: SecondFi traces Cardano wallet exploit to address-level issue
item.description: Cardano wallet SecondFi traced the incident to an address-level issue and secured 129 million ADA after attackers drained funds from 374 addresses.

item.title: Morning Minute: Meta Is Building a Prediction Market
item.description: Arthur Hayes put out a bull case for the CARDS token, and the Clarity Act is facing some surprising opposition from a new group.

item.title: CBOE debuts prediction market with S&P 500 contracts
item.description: Cboe launched its first prediction market product tied to the S&P 500 index, citing a growing investor demand for binary options contracts.

item.title: DOJ Seizes Huione Infrastructure Linked to Billions in Crypto Laundering
item.description: The seizure hits a cloud account that powered Huione Guarantee, a Telegram marketplace tied to billions in Southeast Asian scam proceeds.

item.title: This forgotten coin could surprise everyone before its next halving
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 24, 2026

item.title: CryptoQuant warns on Strategy's dividend coverage as cash reserve falls 38%
item.description: Strategy's cash reserves are now enough to pay only 14 months of dividends from the previous seven-year level. CryptoQuant said the company should pause Bitcoin purchases and rebuild its reserves.

item.title: Aave positioned to capture tokenized asset growth in DeFi: Standard Chartered
item.description: Standard Chartered said tokenized assets moving into DeFi could drive deposits into Aave and help the protocol rebuild its position as a dominant onchain lending platform.

item.title: Bitcoin clings to $62,500 as bears tighten grip on crypto market
item.description: Bitcoin held above $62,500 and ether near $1,665, but sluggish price action and widening put skews signal bears remain firmly in control.

item.title: YZi Labs ends proxy war with BNB treasury company CEA Industries
item.description: Partner Alex Odagiu will serve as an interim president, pending a search for a new chief executive, while head of YZi Labs Ella Zhang and Matthew Roszak also appointed directors of CEA.

item.title: Cboe revives S&P 500 binary options, chasing a market popularized by Polymarket, Kalshi
item.description: One of the largest U.S. derivatives exchanges is bringing back yes/no bets on the S&P 500 after pulling them a decade ago, moving onto turf that Polymarket and Kalshi turned into one of the internet's fastest-growing corners.

item.title: Strategy's MSTR may plunge 80% if it repeats this dot-com-era fractal
item.description: Strategy’s cash reserve is down 38% as dividend obligations near $1.2 billion, raising dilution risk for MSTR shareholders.

item.title: Farage Says He Can Spend Tether Billionaire’s $6.7M Gift ‘On Ferraris’ if He Wants
item.description: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage called the gift from Christopher Harborne a “private matter” amid a standards investigation.

item.title: The Runes revival: Bitcoin traffic hits a two-year high as transactions blast past 820,000
item.description: A surge in Rune protocol activity is pushing Bitcoin transaction counts and fee generation to multi year highs.

item.title: BTC price four-year trend calls for $76K as analysis says Bitcoin 'not broken'
item.description: Bitcoin research said that BTC price action remained in tune with previous cycles as the bear market produces a 20% discount to its four-year "adoption structure" trend line.

item.title: South Korea adds token securities to capital market overhaul
item.description: South Korea’s Financial Services Commission has placed token securities infrastructure within a wider capital-market modernization plan covering faster settlement, longer trading hours and digital transformation.

item.title: Michael Saylor should halt Strategy's bitcoin buys, says CryptoQuant
item.description: CryptoQuant says the cash cushion behind Strategy's STRC has thinned from seven years of coverage to 14 months, and buying BTC at cycle tops has left the company with a $10.6 billion paper loss.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump administration aims to PASS the Crypto market structure bill Before August Recess. It’s finally happening. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE90cmJLUmY2cHhPRFZEanRQNkp0Mm45VlBHZFRsSjQ1U1I4eWZtbTk0QzNWQ3FLTGc5TjhTLTJJckh0UDZ3SmJYOFdjRVAzcDJaZU1LdVdnT1lMWWxUcVhN?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 Trump administration aims to PASS…

item.title: Trump lands in Senate's crosshairs over $500 million UAE investment in his crypto venture
item.description: Senate Democrats call for hearings into whether a $500 million investment by UAE officials in World Liberty Financial influenced Trump's policy decisions.

item.title: OpenPayd secures MiCA license as stablecoin adoption grows in Europe
item.description: OpenPayd, which provides infrastructure to companies including Kraken crypto exchange, can now offer regulated crypto services across Europe under MiCA.

item.title: Bitcoin OGs aren't selling as aggressively as they did above $100,000
item.description: Bitcoin "OGs" have slashed their selling activity to the lowest levels in nearly two years.

item.title: US nears ban on CBDCs until 2030 as housing bill goes to Trump
item.description: The House passed a housing bill with a central bank digital currency ban until 2030, meaning it now just needs US President Donald Trump’s sign-off.

item.title: Catholic leaders, US authorities challenge CLARITY Act over illicit activity
item.description: “Regulatory certainty should not come at the expense of accountability, transparency, victim protection, or public safety,” the law enforcement associations said.

item.title: 🚨 UPDATE: Sui's Bitcoin finance primitive Hashi is set to launch its global testnet this July, with Cumberland, Fluid, and SwissBorg joining its growing institutional coalition. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5rSjRLMnVUWHEwak5QbHpmeEl3UWdfbE9pTGtyRFVNRF9HOEoybS1LNGdhd1JJWkZ2ZG1kWFItOTdzVElsUEFWNVJWU19mN1ZxY21GVFk5UC1Dd2RmcDlJSG82YWM?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 UPDATE: Sui's Bitcoin financ…

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin drops to $62,000 as gold falls below $4,000 for first time this year
item.description: Trading firm Wintermute's options desk puts bitcoin in a $61,242 to $63,563 range for Tuesday, with correlation rising across tokens and no fresh ETF bid in sight.

item.title: Bitcoin drops toward $62,000 as the chip selloff deepens for a second day
item.description: A renewed rout in semiconductor stocks pulled risk assets lower again, and crypto kept sliding. Bitcoin is down 5% on the week, with ether and the memecoins falling harder.

item.title: Senate Dems urge probe into $500M crypto deal between Trumps, UAE
item.description: Democrats want the Senate to hold hearings on the dealings between the Trump administration, World Liberty Financial and Abu Dhabi royalty.

item.title: StarkWare introduces 'Private KYC' to address personal data breaches
item.description: “Identity checks today ask for your whole document when they only need one fact,” Starknet said.

item.title: Crypto PAC's $5.5 million Congress pick gets Maryland win, more crypto allies advance
item.description: The Fairshake super PAC supported Adrian Boafo in Maryland, plus other candidates in Maryland, New York and Utah as each ran its primary elections.

item.title: CryptoQuant Suggests Strategy Pause Bitcoin Accumulation and Prioritize Rebuilding Cash Reserves CryptoQuant Head of Research Julio Moreno said that as Strategy continues issuing STRC preferred stock to fund Bitcoin purchases, its annualized dividen - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9yLURESWVZTFpRa1lIdkp3QUFkWjg3OHdPcVZEX3M4UzFITHlvS1NsQVlWaGxZOUdkeXVRSXFsT0JraWJFUkpVZ2M5YVVMTnBfRXd6VVpQbEJWUDdTWUxlaVJuMA?oc=5" target="_blank">CryptoQuant Suggests Strategy Pa…

item.title: CFTC sues Kentucky after state’s prediction market lawsuits
item.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has sued Kentucky, now the ninth state the regulator is battling in its fight over prediction markets.

item.title: World's Largest Asset Manager BlackRock Advocates Dynamic 1-2% Bitcoin Portfolio Allocation BlackRock, the world's largest asset management firm, stated that Bitcoin's role within investment strategies is evolving, defining it as a viable complementary diver - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBBTFBPT2FPWGVmbmZYb051R1JiUFA4cEotcUZRcXRacUYwejRkZDF4LU0tNURkc2J0TXBGbFZLOGs2TnlPUTZneS05NkJhN2QwQXVXeURaYmdlRXhSVFFQMXoyZw?oc=5" target="_blank">World's Largest Asset Manager Bl…

item.title: Ethereum’s much-hated staking 'tax' may already be obsolete
item.description: Ethereum’s latest “funding crisis” has triggered a fierce debate over whether to tax staking rewards or to pursue funding from large ETH holders for new organizations like EthLabs.

item.title: AI chipmaker Cerebras down 11% after first public earnings report
item.description: While revenue was up 92% from year-ago levels, the company forecasted a lower core gross margin next quarter.

item.title: Meet Qwable: The Free Local Model That Thinks Like Claude Fable
item.description: Someone fine-tuned Fable 5's reasoning style into a local Qwen model. Then someone else removed its conscience.

item.title: Trump's Quantum Push Wins Praise, But Experts Warn Bitcoin Isn't Ready
item.description: Industry leaders welcomed President Trump's quantum executive orders, while researchers said the accelerated timelines reflect growing urgency around post-quantum security and cryptocurrency infrastructure.

item.title: Crypto’s Clarity Act Has a New Enemy: Catholic Leaders
item.description: A group of 82 Catholic leaders warned a key provision of the crypto bill, protecting software developers from prosecution, could enable human trafficking.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Public company Strive CEO Matt Cole tells Bloomberg, "Strive has been buying Bitcoin hand over fist" 👀 "We 4x our Bitcoin holdings operating in a bear market and I look forward to seeing what we can do in a bull market" 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBYYmx2VGRYT3JWV0NiZUhYSFFEcmduYnF0WTlKZU1vYzVLV2FpeU9YVTRUanhTcUQ2MU03Snh3NU5RdF9pbWRDX2tZMkdndW1vY29xVzBpTXBzd1ZMWjMzZmlvQXZoYnM?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Public compan…

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg Wants a Prediction Market Too: NYT
item.description: The initiative follows bets on stablecoins and the metaverse.

item.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Cyber AI Beats Anthropic's Banned Mythos Model—And Nobody's Shutting It Down
item.description: GPT-5.5-Cyber tops the CyberGym leaderboard as Anthropic's best models sit offline under a Trump administration export ban.

item.title: The Ethereum Foundation’s ETH holdings are at their lowest dollar-value in almost 6 years. Is the Ethereum Foundation running out of money? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5aLVg1N2ZZOTgyaHVMMGtSS2NyanVLSXZOQzV3Qk9uME9uZUZGdmI4ZFdyRjNjODFOSWZmbTVLZGZFLTV2dXk1cHl4QUs1SDRETGJrdF91VnJCeFk?oc=5" target="_blank">The Ethereum Foundation’s ETH holdings are …

item.title: AI Agent Triggers Nuclear Strike After Getting Outmaneuvered in Civilization VI
item.description: A new benchmark designed to test strategic reasoning found an AI-controlled empire spent 50 turns developing nuclear weapons to stop a rival's cultural victory—only to lose the game anyway.

item.title: 🚨 THE WAR ON CRYPTO IS ESCALATING FAST. Crypto is now being framed as a national security threat in Washington. Catholic organizations are now urging Congress to oppose major crypto legislation, warning it could create loopholes for traffickers and - x.com

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US House Committee schedules crypto Clarity Act hearing for July 17. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBZRk9hUnJIamh4SDYwVm5hSnp3TjZNMHBsMERrVkJuTFpjeWptWjlvTHYtV2lsby1SQklEYml1VnBWRldMYTJTQVg1U2FxaXR4SkpnMHZGX2pEOGlOaWNoWU5R?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US House Committee s…

item.title: A New OpenClaw Competitor: ToqanClaw Promises Privacy in AI Agent Race
item.description: Prosus launched ToqanClaw, a no-code AI platform positioned as an European alternative to AI agents like OpenClaw.
